titleStmt.title: SII 9.157: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 157. (A.R. No. 566 of 1915.) ON A SLAB LYING IN A FIELD AT KONAKONDLA, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 12, Vibhava, Uttarāyaṇasaṅkrānti corresponding to A.D. 1088 December 24. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and mentions his feudatory Ballaya-Chōḷamahārāja as ruling over Sindavāḍi thousand. It records a grant of land made by the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chikkarasa of Hāmbuḷige belonging to the Mahāvali-Bāṇa family and (carried into effect ?) by the Mahāsāmanta Chandrahasa of Koṇḍakunde, for the service of some god (name lost). The writer was Kōvarāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya
śrīprithvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja paramēsva
ra paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷa
tiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattri
bhuvanamalladēvara rā
jyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddha
mānamācandrārkatāraṁ salutta
mire tatpādapadmōpajīvi sva
sti caraṇasarōruhaviha
taviḷōcanatriḷōcanapramu
khākhiḷapritvīsvarakārita
kāvērītīra kalikālakula
ratnapradīpāhitakumarāṁ
kusa śrīmanmamahāmaṇḍa
ḷēsvara ballayacōḷamahā
rājaru siṁdavāḍi sāsiramumaṁ
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyu
ttamire cāḷukyavikramavarṣa
da 12 neya vibhavasaṁvatsarada
Uttarāyaṇasankrāṁti nimittadiṁ
svasti samadhigatapañcamahāsabda
mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvara vairimadanamahē
svaraṁ sakaḷajagattrayābhivanditasu
rāsurādhīsaparamēsvarapratīhārī
kritamahābalikulōdbhava kṛṣṇa
dhvajavirājita paisācikapaṭaha
bhūṣaṇa vriṣabhalāṁchana naṁdagi
rinātha paṟuvipuravarēsvara bā
ṇakulādityarokkettugaṇḍa śrī
manmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvara hāṁbuḷige
ya cikkarasara datti . svasti samadhiga
tapaṁcamahāsabda mahāsāma
ntā Aridu(r)®dharavarabhujāsibhāsu
ra pracaṇḍapradyōditadinakaraku
lanandana kāsyapagōtra kalikā
lānvaya kāvērīnātha kaṁbaḷapaṟe
ghōṣaṇa sikhisikhādhvaja siṁhalāṁ
chananoreyūrppuravarēsvara ca
ḷadaṁkakāṟa śrīmanmahāsāma
nta koṇḍakundeya caṁdarasaru
bammarasaṁ dēvarasara kayyalpaḍe
kuttiya
māhēsvara ka
ya
ṇḍasphuṭitajī
kkamā
bāci
pūrvvakamendu
koṇḍeya
ḍu biṭṭa
ya nela mattaru
raḍu kisumattaru
mūṟu yya
mattaṟoṁdu pūdōṁ
ṭa 1 ndu gāṇa 1 ndu mane
nivēsaṇa mūṟu Iṁ
tī dharmmāmanārōrvva
naḍasuvavaradē dharmma
Idanaḷidavaṁ vāraṇā
siyalu kavileyuṁ
brāhmaṇarumanaḷida
pātaka . svadattaṁ parada
ttaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁ
dharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasaha
śrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatēkrimiḥ .
kōvarājana
barepa .
Digital edition of SII 9.157 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
